Appearances:
Plaintiff Yangchun Ning is present.
Attorney Jeffrey Chen appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jorge Anticona is present.
Attorney Jeffrey Chen representing the defendant through limited scope.

The settlement attorney Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 525, for settlement discussions.

This case settled per settlement attorney.
The trial date of NOV-21-2011 is vacated.
